pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 52-220 (all three jobs explicitly created)
setup_task.sh lines 31-43 creates credential with id 'github-access-token'; confirmed in README.md lines 48-49
verifier.py line 127 (passed = score >= 60); README.md line 39 explicitly states pass threshold is 60 points

privileged_info_summary: The task contains three intentionally broken Jenkins pipeline jobs. The job names are payment-service-ci, user-auth-service, and inventory-api-build. The correct credential ID for GitHub access is github-access-token, created with username ci-bot. The scoring system awards 30 points per fixed pipeline with a pass threshold of 60 points (minimum 2 of 3 pipelines must be fixed to pass). The three pipelines contain different types of failures: payment-service-ci uses a Windows-only 'bat' step on Linux, user-auth-service references a non-existent credential 'github-deploy-key' instead of the correct 'github-access-token', and inventory-api-build is missing the NEXUS_URL environment variable required by its Publish stage.
